name: Hoppin John Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh Collard Greens, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 - can be doubled easily
Heat peas and water in a large saucepan or Dutch oven with chicken broth until boiling. Boil uncovered for 2 minutes; remove from heat. Cover and let stand at room temperature for an hour. Do not drain.
Stir in crushed red pepper, garlic, and ham. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 1 hour to 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until peas are tender (do not boil as the peas may burst).
Stir in rice, onion, green bell pepper, black or white pepper, celery seed, one cup V-8, and two chicken bouillon cubes. Cover and simmer about 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Cut stems out of the center of collard green leaves. Slice and chop into match-size strips. Stir in collard greens and continue to simmer until heated through.
